payload.label: shoes
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped close-up of a brown leather-like shoe toe with a rounded shape and visible scuffing along the upper and darker sole; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred, photographed at close range (approximately 0.3 m from the camera).
